message: Enhance sysmon JSON/stream, helper help/logging, add smoke tests

files.patch:
@@ -752,33 +752,50 @@ create_monitoring_and_tools() {
 #!/usr/bin/env bash
 # Generated by system_resource_protection_script
 # Colorful, low-dependency TUI with live + historical hogs, per-core bars,
-# disk/net throughput, and optional focus highlighting.
+# disk/net throughput, optional focus highlighting, and JSON snapshot/stream.
 
 set -euo pipefail
 
+if [ "${1:-}" = "--help" ]; then
+  cat <<'USAGE'
+sysmon - live system monitor
+Env flags:
+  SRPS_SYSMON_INTERVAL       Base refresh interval (default 1s)
+  SRPS_SYSMON_PERCORE        1=show per-core bars (default 1)
+  SRPS_SYSMON_FOCUS          Regex to pre-filter top list (optional)
+  SRPS_SYSMON_JSON           1=one-shot JSON snapshot, then exit
+  SRPS_SYSMON_JSON_STREAM    1=NDJSON stream each interval
+  SRPS_SYSMON_ADAPTIVE       1=double interval when not on a TTY
+USAGE
+  exit 0
+fi
+
 interval=${SRPS_SYSMON_INTERVAL:-1}
 rows=$(tput lines 2>/dev/null || echo 24)
 cols=$(tput cols 2>/dev/null || echo 80)
 bar_width=$((cols/3)); [ "$bar_width" -lt 12 ] && bar_width=12
 percore=${SRPS_SYSMON_PERCORE:-1}
 focus_re="${SRPS_SYSMON_FOCUS:-}"  # optional regex to highlight matching commands
 json_mode=${SRPS_SYSMON_JSON:-0}
+json_stream=${SRPS_SYSMON_JSON_STREAM:-0}
+adaptive=${SRPS_SYSMON_ADAPTIVE:-0}
+
+if [ "$json_stream" = "1" ] && [ "$json_mode" = "0" ]; then json_mode=1; fi
 
-declare -A cpu_accu   # command -> cumulative CPU*10*seconds (integer)
-declare -A max_mem    # command -> max mem % seen
-declare -A max_cpu    # command -> max cpu % seen
+# State
+declare -A cpu_accu
+declare -A max_mem
+declare -A max_cpu
 declare -A prev_core_total prev_core_idle
 declare -A prev_dev_r prev_dev_w
 prev_net_rx=""; prev_net_tx=""
 prev_disk_r=""; prev_disk_w=""
 dev_metrics_json="[]"
 last_cpu_pct=0
-mem_used_last=0
-mem_total_last=0
 mem_pct_last=0
 start_ts=$(date +%s)
 
-# Color helpers (tput preferred, ANSI fallback)
+# Colors
 if command -v tput >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   c() { tput setaf "$1"; }
   b() { tput bold; }
@@ -789,7 +806,7 @@ else
   r() { printf '\033[0m'; }
 fi
 
-bar() { # bar <percent> <width>
+bar() {
   local pct=$1 width=$2 filled
   filled=$(( pct * width / 100 ))
   printf '['
@@ -806,6 +823,12 @@ read_cpu_counters() {
   echo "$total $idle_all"
 }
 
+adapt_interval_if_needed() {
+  if [ "$adaptive" -eq 1 ] && { [ ! -t 1 ] || [ -z "${PS1:-}" ]; }; then
+    interval=$(awk -v i="$interval" 'BEGIN {printf "%.2f", i*2}')
+  fi
+}
+
 cpu_line() {
   local t i dt di pct
   read -r t i <<<"$(read_cpu_counters)"
@@ -816,31 +839,45 @@ cpu_line() {
     di=$(( i - prev_idle ))
     pct=$(awk -v dt="$dt" -v di="$di" 'BEGIN { if (dt<=0) {print 0} else {printf "%.0f", (1 - di/dt)*100} }')
   fi
-  prev_total=$t
-  prev_idle=$i
-  last_cpu_pct=$pct
-  printf "%sCPU%s   " "$(c 4)" "$(r)"
-  bar "$pct" "$bar_width"
+  prev_total=$t; prev_idle=$i; last_cpu_pct=$pct
+  printf "%sCPU%s   " "$(c 4)" "$(r)"; bar "$pct" "$bar_width"
   printf "  load %s\n" "$(awk '{printf "%s %s %s", $1, $2, $3}' /proc/loadavg)"
 }
 
 mem_line() {
   local total avail used pct swap_total swap_free swap_used swap_pct
   read -r total avail <<<"$(awk '/MemTotal/ {t=$2} /MemAvailable/ {a=$2} END {print t, a}' /proc/meminfo)"
   used=$(( total - avail ))
-  pct=$(awk -v u="$used" -v t="$total" 'BEGIN { printf "%.0f", (u/t)*100 }')
-  mem_used_last=$used; mem_total_last=$total; mem_pct_last=$pct
+  pct=$(awk -v u="$used" -v t="$total" 'BEGIN { if(t==0){print 0}else{printf "%.0f", (u/t)*100} }')
+  mem_pct_last=$pct
   read -r swap_total swap_free <<<"$(awk '/SwapTotal/ {t=$2} /SwapFree/ {f=$2} END {print t, f}' /proc/meminfo)"
   swap_used=$(( swap_total - swap_free ))
   swap_pct=$(awk -v u="$swap_used" -v t="$swap_total" 'BEGIN { if (t==0) {print 0} else {printf "%.0f", (u/t)*100} }')
-  printf "%sMEM%s  " "$(c 3)" "$(r)"
-  bar "$pct" "$bar_width"
+  printf "%sMEM%s  " "$(c 3)" "$(r)"; bar "$pct" "$bar_width"
   printf "  %5.1f/%5.1f GiB | Swap %3s%%\n" \
     "$(awk -v v="$used" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", v/1048576}')" \
     "$(awk -v v="$total" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", v/1048576}')" \
     "$swap_pct"
 }
 
+collect_cgroups() {
+  cgroup_txt=""; cgroup_json="["; cf=1
+  ps -eo cgroup,%cpu --sort=-%cpu | head -n 50 | \
+    awk '{cg=$1; gsub(/^.+:/,"",cg); if(cg=="-") cg="unknown"; n=split(cg,a,"/"); name=a[n]; if(name=="") name="/"; cpu=$2; sum[name]+=cpu} END {for (n in sum) print sum[n], n}' \
+    | sort -nr | head -n 5 | while read -r cpu name; do
+      cgroup_txt+=$(printf "%-20s CPU:%5.1f%%\n" "$name" "$cpu")
+      [ $cf -eq 1 ] || cgroup_json+=","; cf=0
+      cgroup_json+=$(printf '{"cgroup":"%s","cpu":%.1f}' "$name" "$cpu")
+    done
+  cgroup_json+="]"
+}
+
+print_cgroups() {
+  if [ "$percore" -eq 1 ] && [ -n "$cgroup_txt" ]; then
+    printf "%sTop cgroups (CPU)%s\n%s\n" "$(c 5)" "$(r)" "$cgroup_txt"
+  fi
+}
+
 print_top_cpu() {
   printf "%sTop CPU (live)%s  comm pid ni cpu mem\n" "$(c 1)" "$(r)"
   printf "%-18s %-6s %-5s %-7s %-7s\n" "------------------" "------" "-----" "-------" "-------"
@@ -858,16 +895,13 @@ print_throttled() {
 print_historical() {
   printf "\n%sHistorical hogs (since start)%s\n" "$(c 5)" "$(r)"
   if [ ${#cpu_accu[@]} -eq 0 ]; then
-    echo "(no samples yet)"
-    return
+    echo "(no samples yet)"; return
   fi
-  for k in "${!cpu_accu[@]}"; do
-    printf "%s %s\n" "${cpu_accu[$k]}" "$k"
-  done | sort -nr | head -n 6 | while read -r score name; do
-    cpu_int=$(awk -v s="$score" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", s/10}')
-    printf "%-18s CPU∫:%6.1f  maxCPU:%5s%%  maxMEM:%5s%%\n" \
-      "$name" "$cpu_int" "${max_cpu[$name]:-0}" "${max_mem[$name]:-0}"
-  done
+  for k in "${!cpu_accu[@]}"; do printf "%s %s\n" "${cpu_accu[$k]}" "$k"; done |
+    sort -nr | head -n 6 | while read -r score name; do
+      cpu_int=$(awk -v s="$score" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", s/10}')
+      printf "%-18s CPU∫:%6.1f  maxCPU:%5s%%  maxMEM:%5s%%\n" "$name" "$cpu_int" "${max_cpu[$name]:-0}" "${max_mem[$name]:-0}"
+    done
 }
 
 print_per_core() {
@@ -878,42 +912,33 @@ print_per_core() {
     core=${label#cpu}
     total=$((user+nice+system+idle+iowait+irq+softirq+steal))
     idle_all=$((idle+iowait))
-    prev_t=${prev_core_total[$core]:-0}
-    prev_i=${prev_core_idle[$core]:-0}
-    if [ "$prev_t" -eq 0 ]; then pct=0; else
-      dt=$((total - prev_t)); di=$((idle_all - prev_i));
-      pct=$(awk -v dt="$dt" -v di="$di" 'BEGIN { if (dt<=0){print 0}else{printf "%.0f", (1-di/dt)*100}}')
-    fi
-    prev_core_total[$core]=$total
-    prev_core_idle[$core]=$idle_all
-    printf "cpu%-3s " "$core"
-    bar "$pct" 20
-    printf "\n"
+    prev_t=${prev_core_total[$core]:-0}; prev_i=${prev_core_idle[$core]:-0}
+    if [ "$prev_t" -eq 0 ]; then pct=0; else dt=$((total - prev_t)); di=$((idle_all - prev_i)); pct=$(awk -v dt="$dt" -v di="$di" 'BEGIN { if (dt<=0){print 0}else{printf "%.0f", (1-di/dt)*100}}'); fi
+    prev_core_total[$core]=$total; prev_core_idle[$core]=$idle_all
+    printf "cpu%-3s " "$core"; bar "$pct" 20; printf "\n"
   done < /proc/stat
 }
 
-delta_counter() { # delta_counter prev current -> sets _delta
-  local prev="$1" cur="$2"
-  if [ -z "$prev" ]; then _delta=0; else _delta=$((cur-prev)); fi
-}
+delta_counter() { local prev="$1" cur="$2"; if [ -z "$prev" ]; then _delta=0; else _delta=$((cur-prev)); fi; }
 
 disk_net_lines() {
   local read_sectors=0 write_sectors=0 dev
   local dev_json="["; local dev_first=1
-  while read -r _ _ dev rIO rmerge rsect _ wIO wmerge wsect _ _ _ _; do
-    case "$dev" in sd*|nvme*n*|vd*)
-      read_sectors=$((read_sectors + rsect))
-      write_sectors=$((write_sectors + wsect))
-      delta_counter "${prev_dev_r[$dev]:-}" "$rsect"; rd_d=$_delta; prev_dev_r[$dev]=$rsect
-      delta_counter "${prev_dev_w[$dev]:-}" "$wsect"; wr_d=$_delta; prev_dev_w[$dev]=$wsect
-      dev_r_mb=$(awk -v s="$rd_d" -v int="$interval" 'BEGIN {printf "%.2f", s*512/1048576/int}')
-      dev_w_mb=$(awk -v s="$wr_d" -v int="$interval" 'BEGIN {printf "%.2f", s*512/1048576/int}')
-      if [ "$json_mode" = "1" ]; then
-        [ $dev_first -eq 1 ] || dev_json+=","; dev_first=0
-        dev_json+=$(printf '{"dev":"%s","read_mb_s":%s,"write_mb_s":%s}' "$dev" "$dev_r_mb" "$dev_w_mb")
-      fi
-    ;; esac
-  done < /proc/diskstats
+  if [ -r /proc/diskstats ]; then
+    while read -r _ _ dev rIO rmerge rsect _ wIO wmerge wsect _ _ _ _; do
+      case "$dev" in sd*|nvme*n*|vd*)
+        read_sectors=$((read_sectors + rsect)); write_sectors=$((write_sectors + wsect))
+        delta_counter "${prev_dev_r[$dev]:-}" "$rsect"; rd_d=$_delta; prev_dev_r[$dev]=$rsect
+        delta_counter "${prev_dev_w[$dev]:-}" "$wsect"; wr_d=$_delta; prev_dev_w[$dev]=$wsect
+        dev_r_mb=$(awk -v s="$rd_d" -v int="$interval" 'BEGIN {printf "%.2f", s*512/1048576/int}')
+        dev_w_mb=$(awk -v s="$wr_d" -v int="$interval" 'BEGIN {printf "%.2f", s*512/1048576/int}')
+        if [ "$json_mode" = "1" ] || [ "$json_stream" = "1" ]; then
+          [ $dev_first -eq 1 ] || dev_json+=","; dev_first=0
+          dev_json+=$(printf '{"dev":"%s","read_mb_s":%s,"write_mb_s":%s}' "$dev" "$dev_r_mb" "$dev_w_mb")
+        fi
+      ;; esac
+    done < /proc/diskstats
+  fi
   dev_json+="]"; dev_metrics_json=$dev_json
 
   delta_counter "$prev_disk_r" "$read_sectors"; rd=$_delta; prev_disk_r=$read_sectors
@@ -922,154 +947,135 @@ disk_net_lines() {
   wr_mb=$(awk -v s="$wr" -v int="$interval" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", s*512/1048576/int}')
 
   local rx_bytes=0 tx_bytes=0
-  while read -r iface rest; do
-    rx=$(echo "$rest" | awk '{print $1}')
-    tx=$(echo "$rest" | awk '{print $9}')
-    rx_bytes=$((rx_bytes + rx))
-    tx_bytes=$((tx_bytes + tx))
-  done < <(sed -n '3,$p' /proc/net/dev | tr -s ' ')
+  if [ -r /proc/net/dev ]; then
+    while read -r iface rest; do
+      rx=$(echo "$rest" | awk '{print $1}'); tx=$(echo "$rest" | awk '{print $9}')
+      rx_bytes=$((rx_bytes + rx)); tx_bytes=$((tx_bytes + tx))
+    done < <(sed -n '3,$p' /proc/net/dev | tr -s ' ')
+  fi
 
   delta_counter "$prev_net_rx" "$rx_bytes"; rx_d=$_delta; prev_net_rx=$rx_bytes
   delta_counter "$prev_net_tx" "$tx_bytes"; tx_d=$_delta; prev_net_tx=$tx_bytes
   rx_mbps=$(awk -v b="$rx_d" -v int="$interval" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", (b*8/1e6)/int}')
   tx_mbps=$(awk -v b="$tx_d" -v int="$interval" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", (b*8/1e6)/int}')
 
   last_rd_mb=$rd_mb; last_wr_mb=$wr_mb; last_rx_mbps=$rx_mbps; last_tx_mbps=$tx_mbps
-
-  printf "%sIO%s   R:%5.1fMB/s W:%5.1fMB/s   %sNET%s RX:%5.1fMb/s TX:%5.1fMb/s\n" \
+  printf "%sIO%s   R:%5.1fMB/s W:%5.1fMB/s   %sNET%s RX:%5.1fMb/s TX:%5.1fMb/s
+" \
     "$(c 6)" "$(r)" "$rd_mb" "$wr_mb" "$(c 6)" "$(r)" "$rx_mbps" "$tx_mbps"
 }
 
 print_footer() {
   runtime=$(( $(date +%s) - start_ts ))
-  printf "\n%sTip:%s SRPS_SYSMON_INTERVAL=2 to slow refresh; SRPS_SYSMON_FOCUS='node' to focus; Ctrl+C to exit.  Uptime: %ss\n" "$(c 6)" "$(r)" "$runtime"
+  printf "
+%sTip:%s SRPS_SYSMON_INTERVAL=2 to slow refresh; SRPS_SYSMON_FOCUS='node' to focus; Ctrl+C to exit.  Uptime: %ss
+" "$(c 6)" "$(r)" "$runtime"
 }
 
-prev_total=""; prev_idle=""
-json_warmup=0
+prev_total=""; prev_idle=""; json_warmup=0; adapt_interval_if_needed
 
 while true; do
   snapshot=$(ps -eo comm,pid,ni,%cpu,%mem --sort=-%cpu | head -n 8)
   view="$snapshot"
 
   while read -r comm pid ni cpu mem; do
     [ -z "$comm" ] && continue
-    cpu10=$(awk -v c="$cpu" 'BEGIN {printf "%d", c*10}')
-    cpu_accu["$comm"]=$(( ${cpu_accu[$comm]:-0} + cpu10 * interval ))
+    cpu10=$(awk -v c="$cpu" 'BEGIN {printf "%d", c*10}'); cpu_accu["$comm"]=$(( ${cpu_accu[$comm]:-0} + cpu10 * interval ))
     cur_cpu_int=$(awk -v c="$cpu" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", c}')
     cur_mem_int=$(awk -v m="$mem" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", m}')
     awk -v cur="$cur_cpu_int" -v max="${max_cpu[$comm]:-0}" 'BEGIN {exit !(cur>max)}' && max_cpu[$comm]=$cur_cpu_int
     awk -v cur="$cur_mem_int" -v max="${max_mem[$comm]:-0}" 'BEGIN {exit !(cur>max)}' && max_mem[$comm]=$cur_mem_int
   done <<< "$snapshot"
 
-  clear
-  printf "%s%sSYSTEM RESOURCE MONITOR%s\n" "$(b)" "$(c 6)" "$(r)"
-  printf "%s%(%a %b %d %H:%M:%S %Z %Y)T%s\n\n" "$(b)" -1 "$(r)"
-  cpu_line
-  mem_line
-  disk_net_lines
-  printf "\n"
+  clear 2>/dev/null || true
+  printf "%s%sSYSTEM RESOURCE MONITOR%s
+" "$(b)" "$(c 6)" "$(r)"
+  printf "%s%(%a %b %d %H:%M:%S %Z %Y)T%s
+
+" "$(b)" -1 "$(r)"
+  cpu_line; mem_line; disk_net_lines; collect_cgroups; printf "
+"
 
   if [ -n "$focus_re" ]; then
     focus_view=$(echo "$snapshot" | awk -v re="$focus_re" '$0 ~ re')
-    printf "%sFocus (re: %s)%s\n" "$(c 6)" "$focus_re" "$(r)"
+    printf "%sFocus (re: %s)%s
+" "$(c 6)" "$focus_re" "$(r)"
     if [ -n "$focus_view" ]; then
-      echo "$focus_view" | awk '{printf "%-18s %-6s NI:%3s CPU:%5s%% MEM:%5s%%\n", $1, $2, $3, $4, $5}'
-      printf "\n"
-      view="$focus_view"
+      echo "$focus_view" | awk '{printf "%-18s %-6s NI:%3s CPU:%5s%% MEM:%5s%%
+", $1, $2, $3, $4, $5}'
+      printf "
+"; view="$focus_view"
     else
-      echo "(no matches)\n"
+      echo "(no matches)
+"
     fi
   fi
 
+  print_top_cpu; print_throttled; print_historical; print_per_core; print_cgroups; print_footer
+
   if [ "$json_mode" = "1" ]; then
-    if [ $json_warmup -eq 0 ]; then
-      json_warmup=1
-      sleep "$interval"
-      continue
-    fi
-    # Build JSON snapshot and exit after one iteration
-    # Escape helper
+    if [ $json_warmup -eq 0 ]; then json_warmup=1; sleep "$interval"; continue; fi
     esc(){ printf '%s' "$1" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g; s/"/\\"/g'; }
-
-    # Live top list (view honors focus if set)
     top_json="["; tf=1
     while read -r cmd pid ni cpu mem; do
       [ -n "$cmd" ] || continue
       [ $tf -eq 1 ] || top_json+=","; tf=0
-      top_json+=$(printf '{"cmd":"%s","pid":%s,"nice":%s,"cpu":%s,"mem":%s}' \
-        "$(esc "$cmd")" "$pid" "$ni" "$cpu" "$mem")
+      top_json+=$(printf '{"cmd":"%s","pid":%s,"nice":%s,"cpu":%s,"mem":%s}' "$(esc "$cmd")" "$pid" "$ni" "$cpu" "$mem")
     done <<< "$view"
-    top_json+="]"
 
-    # Historical hogs
-    hist_json="["
-    first=1
+    hist_json="["; hf=1
     for k in "${!cpu_accu[@]}"; do
-      [ "$first" -eq 1 ] || hist_json+=","; first=0
-      cpu_int=$(awk -v s="${cpu_accu[$k]}" 'BEGIN{printf "%.1f", s/10}')
-      hist_json+=$(printf '{"cmd":"%s","cpu_integral":%s,"max_cpu":%s,"max_mem":%s}' \
-        "$(esc "$k")" "$cpu_int" "${max_cpu[$k]:-0}" "${max_mem[$k]:-0}")
-    done
-    hist_json+="]"
+      [ $hf -eq 1 ] || hist_json+=","; hf=0
+      cpu_int=$(awk -v s="${cpu_accu[$k]}" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", s/10}')
+      hist_json+=$(printf '{"cmd":"%s","cpu_integral":%s,"max_cpu":%s,"max_mem":%s}' "$(esc "$k")" "$cpu_int" "${max_cpu[$k]:-0}" "${max_mem[$k]:-0}")
+    done; hist_json+="]"
 
-    # Per-core snapshot (if enabled)
     percore_json="[]"
     if [ "$percore" -eq 1 ]; then
       pc_tmp=""
       while read -r label user nice system idle iowait irq softirq steal _; do
         case "$label" in cpu) continue ;; cpu*) ;; *) continue;; esac
         core=${label#cpu}
-        total=$((user+nice+system+idle+iowait+irq+softirq+steal))
-        idle_all=$((idle+iowait))
-        prev_t=${prev_core_total[$core]:-0}
-        prev_i=${prev_core_idle[$core]:-0}
-        if [ "$prev_t" -eq 0 ]; then pct=0; else
-          dt=$((total - prev_t)); di=$((idle_all - prev_i));
-          pct=$(awk -v dt="$dt" -v di="$di" 'BEGIN { if (dt<=0){print 0}else{printf "%.0f", (1-di/dt)*100}}')
-        fi
+        total=$((user+nice+system+idle+iowait+irq+softirq+steal)); idle_all=$((idle+iowait))
+        prev_t=${prev_core_total[$core]:-0}; prev_i=${prev_core_idle[$core]:-0}
+        if [ "$prev_t" -eq 0 ]; then pct=0; else dt=$((total - prev_t)); di=$((idle_all - prev_i)); pct=$(awk -v dt="$dt" -v di="$di" 'BEGIN { if (dt<=0){print 0}else{printf "%.0f", (1-di/dt)*100}}'); fi
         prev_core_total[$core]=$total; prev_core_idle[$core]=$idle_all
         pc_tmp+=$(printf '{"core":"%s","cpu":%s},' "$core" "$pct")
       done < /proc/stat
       percore_json="[${pc_tmp%,}]"
     fi
 
-    # IO / Net
     io_json=$(printf '{"disk_read_mb_s":%.1f,"disk_write_mb_s":%.1f,"net_rx_mbps":%.1f,"net_tx_mbps":%.1f,"per_device":%s}' \
       "$rd_mb" "$wr_mb" "$rx_mbps" "$tx_mbps" "$dev_metrics_json")
 
-    # Temps (best effort)
-    temps_json="["; tf=1
+    temps_json="["; tfz=1
     for tfpath in /sys/class/thermal/thermal_zone*/temp; do
       [ -f "$tfpath" ] || continue
       t_raw=$(cat "$tfpath" 2>/dev/null || true); [ -z "$t_raw" ] && continue
       t_c=$(awk -v t="$t_raw" 'BEGIN {printf "%.1f", t/1000}')
       zone=$(basename "$(dirname "$tfpath")")
-      [ $tf -eq 1 ] || temps_json+=","; tf=0
+      [ $tfz -eq 1 ] || temps_json+=","; tfz=0
       temps_json+=$(printf '{"zone":"%s","temp_c":%s}' "$zone" "$t_c")
-    done
-    temps_json+="]"
+    done; temps_json+="]"
 
-    # Inotify caps
     max_w=$(cat /proc/sys/fs/inotify/max_user_watches 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
     max_i=$(cat /proc/sys/fs/inotify/max_user_instances 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
     nr_w=$(cat /proc/sys/fs/inotify/nr_watches 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
     inotify_json=$(printf '{"max_user_watches":%s,"max_user_instances":%s,"nr_watches":%s}' "$max_w" "$max_i" "$nr_w")
 
-    cpu_pct_out=$last_cpu_pct
-    mem_pct_out=$mem_pct_last
-    printf '{"timestamp":%s,"cpu":%s,"mem":%s,"top":%s,"historical":%s,"per_core":%s,"io":%s,"temps":%s,"inotify":%s}\n' \

-    exit 0
+    printf '{"timestamp":%s,"cpu":%s,"mem":%s,"top":%s,"historical":%s,"per_core":%s,"io":%s,"temps":%s,"inotify":%s,"cgroups":%s}
+' \
+      "$(date +%s)" "$last_cpu_pct" "$mem_pct_last" "$top_json" "$hist_json" "$percore_json" "$io_json" "$temps_json" "$inotify_json" "$cgroup_json"
+    [ "$json_stream" = "1" ] || exit 0
   fi
 
-  print_top_cpu
-  print_throttled
-  print_historical
-  print_per_core
-  print_footer

+  sleep_time="$interval"
+  if [ "$json_stream" != "1" ]; then
+    jitter=$(awk 'BEGIN {srand(); printf "%.2f", rand()*0.15}'); sleep_time=$(awk -v b="$interval" -v j="$jitter" 'BEGIN {printf "%.2f", b+j}')
+  fi
+  sleep "$sleep_time"
 done
+
 EOF
     sudo chmod +x "$sysmon"
 
@@ -1086,6 +1092,15 @@ EOF
 # Generated by system_resource_protection_script

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.."
+
+echo "[smoke] bash -n install.sh"
+bash -n install.sh
+
+echo "[smoke] sysmon JSON snapshot"
+SRPS_SYSMON_JSON=1 SRPS_SYSMON_INTERVAL=0.1 ./install.sh --plan >/tmp/srps-plan.log || true
+SRPS_SYSMON_JSON=1 SRPS_SYSMON_INTERVAL=0.1 /usr/local/bin/sysmon >/tmp/sysmon.json
+python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('/tmp/sysmon.json'))"
+
+echo "[smoke] check-throttled JSON"
+SRPS_JSON=1 /usr/local/bin/check-throttled >/tmp/check-throttled.json
+python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('/tmp/check-throttled.json'))"
+
+echo "[smoke] cursor-guard JSON"
+SRPS_JSON=1 /usr/local/bin/cursor-guard >/tmp/cursor-guard.json
+python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('/tmp/cursor-guard.json'))"
+
+echo "[smoke] doctor JSON"
+SRPS_JSON=1 /usr/local/bin/srps-doctor >/tmp/srps-doctor.json
+python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('/tmp/srps-doctor.json'))"
+
+echo "[smoke] reload-rules JSON"
+SRPS_JSON=1 /usr/local/bin/srps-reload-rules >/tmp/srps-reload.json || true
+python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('/tmp/srps-reload.json'))" || true
+
+echo "[smoke] done"
